mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_no as emp_no, e.role as role, e.real_name as real_name, pl.real_name AS pl_name, pm.real_name AS pm_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN employee pl ON e.pl_id = pl.id LEFT JOIN employee pm ON e.pm_id = pm.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( emp_no, password, real_name, pm_id, pl_id, role, phone, base_salary, position_salary, housing_subsidy, car_subsidy, meal_subsidy, other_subsidy, status, created_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{empNo}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{pmId}, #{plId}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{baseSalary}, #{positionSalary}, #{housingSubsidy}, #{carSubsidy}, #{mealSubsidy}, #{otherSubsidy}, 1, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, real_name as pm_name FROM employee WHERE role = 2
SELECT id, real_name as pl_name FROM employee WHERE role = 1 AND pm_id = #{pmId}
